customManagers.description: Track Node.js version in mise.toml — captures bare semver; the node-version datasource returns bare numeric so no extractVersion needed
Track pnpm version in mise.toml — captures bare semver; the npm datasource returns bare numeric
Track Deno version in mise.toml — captures bare numeric only; extractVersion strips the v prefix from github-releases tags so write-back is also bare numeric
Track Deno jsr: imports pinned to exact versions (major-only pins like '@2' are intentionally ignored)

packageRules.description: Label every Renovate PR for filtering
Tag major updates for triage (no automerge anywhere; default automerge is false)
Group Astro core + integrations (excludes @astrojs/tailwind, which groups with Tailwind)
Group Tailwind CSS core, plugins, and @astrojs/tailwind (bundled so v3→v4 migration lands as one PR)
Group Prettier and its plugins (plugin versions are tied to Prettier's API)
Group astro-icon and Iconify JSON packages (icon renderer + icon set versions move together)
Cross-file: collapse Node bumps from mise.toml customManager into one PR; apply 5-day supply-chain floor
Cross-file: collapse pnpm bumps from mise.toml customManager, packageManager field, and engines.pnpm into one PR; apply 5-day supply-chain floor

Keep engines fields as ranges, never exact pins. engines declares the supported version range; the exact selectors are packageManager + mise.toml (still pinned by the global rangeStrategy:pin). Without this override, rangeStrategy:pin rewrites engines.pnpm to an exact version that drifts from the actual pinned pnpm. 'replace' (unlike 'bump') only rewrites the range when a release falls outside it: pnpm 11.x minor/patch updates leave '>=11 <12' unchanged, and it changes only at a new major (pnpm 12.x).
Cross-file: collapse Deno bumps from mise.toml customManager into one PR; apply 5-day supply-chain floor
5-day minimum age for Deno jsr: imports (matchDepTypes is npm-only; jsr-tracked deps need their own datasource rule)
5-day minimum age for production dependencies (supply-chain protection)
5-day minimum age for dev dependencies (matches prod-dep floor; pnpm enforces the same floor at install time for transitives via pnpm-workspace.yaml)
